title: paspalum brachytrichum
intro: Paspalum brachytrichum, also known as short-spiked paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum brachytrichum include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
